title: HorizonControlPoints
description: Horizon control points (seed points) representing sparse interpreter picks used to guide automated horizon tracking. Each control point captures a single depth or time pick at a spatial location. This work-product-component specializes AbstractRepresentation to deliver sparse seed points for a HorizonInterpretation. The InterpretationID links to the target HorizonInterpretation, while RepresentationRole (typically Pick) and RepresentationType (typically PointSet) characterize this representation. Control points capture key structural features, well ties, or high-confidence areas, and may serve as training labels for ML-based horizon prediction. Data may be stored inline via ColumnValues or as attached datasets such as File.TabularData.

kind.title: Entity Kind

legal.title: Legal Tags

tags.title: Tag Dictionary
tags.description: A generic dictionary of string keys mapping to string value. Only strings are permitted as keys and values.

createTime.title: Resource Object Creation DateTime

createUser.title: Resource Object Creation User Reference

modifyTime.description: Timestamp of the time at which this version of the OSDU resource object was created. Set by the System. The value is a combined date-time string in ISO-8601 given in UTC.
modifyTime.title: Resource Object Version Creation DateTime

modifyUser.title: Resource Object Version Creation User Reference
modifyUser.description: The user reference, which created this version of this resource object. Set by the System.

ancestry.description: The links to data, which constitute the inputs, from which this record instance is derived.
ancestry.title: Ancestry

meta.description: The Frame of Reference meta data section linking the named properties to self-contained definitions.
meta.title: Frame of Reference Meta Data

RepresentationRole.title: Representation Role
RepresentationRole.description: The RepresentationRole assigned to these control points. For HorizonControlPoints, this is typically 'Pick' as they represent manual interpreter picks.

RepresentationType.title: Representation Type
RepresentationType.description: The RepresentationType for this representation. For HorizonControlPoints, this is typically PointSet, representing sparse spatial coordinates (seed points) used to guide automated horizon tracking algorithms.

SeismicTraceDataIDs.title: SeismicTraceDataIDs
SeismicTraceDataIDs.description: The seismic trace datasets (2D or 3D) on which the control points were interpreted. Supports multiple datasets when control points are picked across different seismic vintages or processing versions.

BinGridID.title: Bin Grid ID
BinGridID.description: Explicit 3D bin grid geometry for control points, providing spatial resolution from Inline/Crossline to X,Y coordinates. If populated and all control points are defined by Inline/Crossline, `HorizontalCRSID` is not required. If any control points use explicit X,Y coordinates instead, `HorizontalCRSID` must also be populated. Overrides bin grid from Seismic3DInterpretationSet if specified. If empty and Seismic3DInterpretationSetID is populated, bin grid is inherited from Seismic3DInterpretationSet.SeismicBinGridID

SeismicLineGeometryIDs.title: Seismic Line Geometry IDs
SeismicLineGeometryIDs.description: Explicit 2D seismic line geometries for control points, providing spatial resolution from line position to X,Y coordinates. If populated and all control points are defined by line position, `HorizontalCRSID` is not required. If any control points use explicit X,Y coordinates instead, `HorizontalCRSID` must also be populated. Overrides geometries inferred from Seismic2DInterpretationSet. If empty and Seismic2DInterpretationSetID is populated, geometries are inherited from Seismic2DInterpretationSet.SeismicLineGeometries[].

Seismic3DInterpretationSetID.title: Seismic3DInterpretationSetID
Seismic3DInterpretationSetID.description: Reference to the 3D interpretation set supporting this control point picking (not the acquisition survey or application project). The seismic bin grid geometry required to resolve spatial locations is inherited from the interpretation set. The WPC SpatialArea may reflect the survey extent where horizon control points were picked. Mutually exclusive with Seismic2DInterpretationSetID.

Seismic2DInterpretationSetID.title: Seismic2DInterpretationSetID
Seismic2DInterpretationSetID.description: Reference to the 2D interpretation set supporting this control point picking (not the acquisition survey or application project). The seismic line geometries required to resolve spatial locations are inherited from the interpretation set. The WPC SpatialArea may reflect the seismic lines where horizon control points were picked. Mutually exclusive with Seismic3DInterpretationSetID.

DomainTypeID.title: DomainTypeID
DomainTypeID.description:
Describes the domain type for the control points, for example, Depth or Time. This property is added here to be human friendly and support search use cases. This information is also captured in the `Horizon Interpretation` through the `data.DomainTypeID` property and should be 
synchronized.

HorizontalCRSID.title: Horizontal CRS ID
HorizontalCRSID.description: Horizontal coordinate reference system for X,Y coordinates in the HorizonControlPoints table. Required when control points include explicit spatial coordinates (e.g. Easting/Northing) rather than being fully resolved via BinGridID or SeismicLineGeometryIDs. If BinGridID or SeismicLineGeometryIDs are populated and all control points are defined by Inline/Crossline or line position, this property may be absent.

VerticalDatum.title: VerticalDatum
VerticalDatum.description: Defines the vertical reference datum (e.g. MSL) for the Z-values or depth/time measurements in the HorizonControlPoints table. This establishes the vertical coordinate system for all control points in this collection.

WellboreMarkerSetIDs.title: Wellbore Marker Set IDs
WellboreMarkerSetIDs.description: Optional references to WellboreMarkerSet records containing formation tops at well locations. When control points are picked at or near well locations, these marker set references enable well-tie validation and provide depth calibration data for time-depth conversion validation.

HorizonControlPoints.title: Horizon Control Points
HorizonControlPoints.description: Tabular data containing the control point locations and associated values. Each row represents a single seed point with spatial coordinates (X,Y or Inline/Crossline) and vertical datums (depth or time). Additional columns may include interpretation confidence, pick quality, source marker identifiers (e.g. linking to WellboreMarkerSet), or other attributes.
